markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Review content performance and align on future strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=27.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**New content drives traffic:** Recent articles in subclusters like "Scheduling & Call-offs" and "Surveys" generated immediate traffic spikes, validating the content strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Traffic attracts smaller businesses:** The tactical, task-oriented content is attracting smaller businesses (SMBs), not the desired enterprise leads.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Strategy pivot to enterprise:** Future content will shift to conceptual, benefit-driven topics (e.g., "Frontline Intelligence") and niche competitive comparisons to target larger companies.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Indexing issue resolved:** The indexing problem is solved. The fix (changing a page's slug) immediately drove traffic, proving the content was valuable but hidden from search.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)

## Topics

### Performance Analysis: Subcluster Growth

  - [Analysis of individual subclusters reveals a clear correlation: new content → immediate traffic growth.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=82.0)
  - [**Scheduling & Call-offs:** Strong growth and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Why:** The focus on "call-offs" addresses a specific, high-pain point for the audience.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
      - [**Proof:** Fixing an indexing issue on a call-offs article (by changing its slug) immediately drove traffic, confirming the content's value.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [**Templates:** Growth driven by new content, primarily for safety and engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=136.0)
  - [**Surveys & Feedback:** A spike in May followed the publication of four new articles, then traffic normalized.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Why:** Google's temporary preference for new content, not a sudden surge in market demand.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [**Translation & Multilingual:** Steady growth, but analysis shows the "Cost of translation" article is the primary driver.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
      - [**Why:** It attracts users with high-intent queries (e.g., "looking for translators").](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)

### Problem: Traffic Attracting Smaller Businesses

  - [**Observation:** Recent SEO/SEM efforts generated \~20 leads, but all were from small companies.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Hypothesis:** The current tactical content (e.g., "employee texting") attracts SMBs because it solves immediate, hands-on problems for individuals in multi-role positions.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=768.0)
  - [**Goal:** Attract enterprise leads, who require content focused on high-level business benefits and strategic value.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

### Solution: New Content Strategy for Enterprise

  - [**Frontline Intelligence:** The new topic will be used to create conceptual, benefit-driven content.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
      - [**Why:** To shift focus from tactical execution to strategic value (e.g., "frontline workforce visibility as a game changer").](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [**Competitive Content:** A future strategy to target enterprise users already on competitor platforms (e.g., Beekeeper).](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
      - [**Why:** To highlight Yourco's specific advantages (e.g., SMS-based communication, no app download) over competitor pain points (e.g., low app adoption).](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1131.0)
      - [**Approach:** Focus on niche use cases and specific problems (e.g., "alternatives to Beekeeper for low adoption"), not broad comparisons.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1219.0)
      - [**Timing:** Develop this content after the Frontline Intelligence product is mature enough to showcase its unique analytical capabilities.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1307.0)

### Technical & Reporting Updates

  - [**Indexing Issue Resolved:** Only one page remains unindexed.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [**Why:** The fix (changing a page's slug) worked, proving the problem was related to Google's difficulty distinguishing between similar URLs.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [**Looker Reporting:** All old, non-GrowthX content is now included in the cohort and subcluster reports.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
      - [**How:** Uncheck the "non-content" filter to view the full content set.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Carrie:** Continue creating new "Frontline Intelligence" content and refreshing existing articles from the audit list.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
  - [**Jessica:** Review the updated Looker reports, which now include all legacy content.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1661.0)
  - [**Both:** Revisit the competitive content strategy in the new year, after the Frontline Intelligence product is mature.](https://fathom.video/share/jysk7QycuA3ZNGCNS_fHWdCVPZ71sn_T?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
